TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_calenget, title = calenget, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/calenget} }

S.FORM: calenget (kamu nu Hulam: ÁôĘ ) yadah ku sazumaay a calenget.calenget ku nikalatan nu atimela, likes, puduh atu lutuk (mahiza u lidateng atu sedeng). uynan a calenget nu banges. izaw ku calenget nay sen-cing atu naybalucu'.
S.PHON: ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: * ) jadańß ku sazumaaj a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt. ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt ku nikar~…ĺatan nu atim…ôr~…ĺa, r~…ĺik…ôs, puduńß atu r~…ĺutuk (mańßiza u r~…ĺidat…ôŇč atu s…ôd…ôŇč). ujnan a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt nu baŇč…ôs. izaw ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt naj s…ôn- ¶iŇč atu najbar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °.
S.FORM: calenget (kamu nu Hulam: ÁôĘ ) yadah ku sazumaay a calenget.calenget ku nikalatan nu atimela, likes, puduh atu lutuk (mahiza u lidateng atu sedeng). uynan a calenget nu banges. izaw ku calenget nay sen-cing atu naybalucu'.
S.PHON: ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: * ) jadańß ku sazumaaj a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt. ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt ku nikar~…ĺatan nu atim…ôr~…ĺa, r~…ĺik…ôs, puduńß atu r~…ĺutuk (mańßiza u r~…ĺidat…ôŇč atu s…ôd…ôŇč). ujnan a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt nu baŇč…ôs. izaw ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt naj s…ôn- ¶iŇč atu najbar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °.
